---
title: "prof"
output: html_document
---

## 1. Load Libraries

```{r load-libraries}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

## 2. Load and Explore Data

```{r load-data}
data <- read_csv2("../data.csv")
```

## 3. Data Cleaning and Preparation

```{r clean-data}
# Clean and transform the data
data_clean <- data %>%
  # Convert birth year to numeric
  mutate(annais = as.numeric(as.character(annais))) %>%
  # Remove rows with missing birth years
  filter(!is.na(annais)) %>%
  # Remove rare names category
  filter(preusuel != "_PRENOMS_RARES") %>%
  # Create decade grouping
  mutate(decade = (annais %/% 10) * 10)

head(data_clean)
```

## 4. Aggregate Data by Decade and Name

```{r aggregate-data}
# Aggregate births by decade and name
data_agg <- data_clean %>%
  group_by(decade, preusuel) %>%
  summarise(
    total = sum(nombre, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

head(data_agg)
```

## 5. Filter Data for Prof Names

```{r filter-name}
profs_names <- c(
  "NICOLAS", "JULIEN", "MATHIEU", "AURÉLIE", "ROMAIN",
  "ISABELLE", "PHILIPPE", "RÉMY", "PIERRE", "CLAIRE",
  "CEDRIC", "AGNS", "VÉRONIQUE", "ERIC", "ADRIEN",
  "RENÉ", "ETIENNE", "ALI"
)

data_prof <- data_agg %>%
  filter(preusuel %in% profs_names)

# Diagnostic: check which names actually matched
matched   <- intersect(profs_names, unique(data_prof$preusuel))
unmatched <- setdiff(profs_names, matched)

cat("Matched names  :", paste(matched,   collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Unmatched names:", paste(unmatched, collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

## 6. Visualization: Evolution of Prof Names

```{r plot-evolution, fig.width=14, fig.height=8}
# Load necessary libraries
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(scales)

# Visualization: Evolution of Prof Names
ggplot(data_prof, aes(x = decade, y = total, fill = preusuel)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.85) +
  facet_wrap(~preusuel, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number()) +
  labs(
    title = "Popularité des Prénoms des Professeurs",
    subtitle = "Fréquence par décennie",
    x = "Décennie",
    y = "Nombre de naissances"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray96", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5)
  )
```

```{r}
library(svglite)
library(scales)
library(viridis)

# Define the modernized plot
p <- ggplot(data_prof, aes(x = decade, y = total, fill = preusuel)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number()) +
  labs(
    title = "Évolution de la popularité des prénoms des professeurs",
    subtitle = "Fréquence totale par décennie",
    x = "Décennie",
    y = "Nombre de naissances"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~preusuel, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 12, color = "gray40", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 15)),
    axis.title      = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray96", color = NA),
    strip.text      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90"),
    panel.spacing   = unit(1.2, "lines")
  )

# Export as SVG
ggsave("prof_names_evolution_modern.svg", plot = p, device = "svg", width = 14, height = 8)

```


```{r}
library(tidyr)

# Prepare data: Ensure all decades are represented for each name
data_csv_export <- data_prof %>%
  complete(decade, preusuel, fill = list(total = 0)) %>%
  rename(year = decade, name = preusuel, count = total)

# Write to CSV
write_csv(data_csv_export, "prof_names_evolution.csv")
```
